title: Surgeon Vacancy at Sanofi India Asia Pacific Associates - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Surgeon Vacancy at Sanofi India Asia Pacific Associates - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Sanofi India Asia Pacific Associates has an exciting opening for a Surgeon at our Surat office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Sanofi India Asia Pacific Associates:
Sanofi India Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Surat, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Sanofi India Asia Pacific Associates!
